full_text:
Wang Ye 王業
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Ye (王業). Taken into Cao Mao’s confidence but betrayed it to Sima Zhao. Wang Ye was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
